trash description: In Palafolls, it is mandatory to separate waste and dispose of it in the appropriate containers.
yellow: Yellow — plastic packaging, cans, and cartons
container description: Dispose of waste only in the designated containers. Leaving bags outside, on the street, roadside, or in natural areas is prohibited and may result in fines. In Palafolls, penalties for dumping waste outside the containers can reach up to €3,000 according to municipal regulations.

info beaches: In this section you will find 9 nearby beaches that you can easily visit from here. The closest ones are wide sandy beaches, perfect for spending the day, swimming, and enjoying the sea. If you head toward Lloret de Mar, you will also find smaller, more natural coves, with crystal-clear waters and rich marine life, ideal for snorkeling and exploring the seabed. Each beach has its own charm: from family beaches with full services to quieter spots surrounded by nature.
info restaurants: Here you will find a selection of 14 local restaurants that have their own parking, making your visit much easier. It is recommended to reserve a table in advance, as restaurants can often be fully booked. Please note that some restaurants open only for lunch, while others also offer dinner service, so it is advisable to check the opening hours in advance before choosing.
